title: He Flew Drones Over North Korea to Justify Martial Law. 30 Years.
script: A president ordered what? South Korea's Yoon Suk Yeol — who declared emergency martial law in December 2024 — just got 30 years in prison. And here's why: prosecutors proved Yoon secretly ordered the military to fly surveillance drones over Pyongyang, North Korea's capital, hoping to provoke a military reaction that would justify the martial law. His defense minister, Kim Yong Hyun, got 30 years alongside him. The Seoul Central District Court called it a deliberate abuse of authority for personal political gain. Yoon appealed immediately. The whole scheme depended on North Korea reacting to a military provocation it never actually knew about. If those surveillance drones had caused an incident — would anyone have questioned the martial law?
